title: Inconsistent reg update on negedge due to input assignment

features.name: dual_clock_edge_triggered_block
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered by negedge of one clock OR posedge of another clock
features.snippet:
always @(negedge clock_0 or posedge clock_1) begin
  if (clock_1) begin
    reg_0 <= 1;
  end else begin
    reg_0 <= wire_0;
  end
end

features.name: continuous_assign_input_bit_select_in_always
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment from an input bit-select used inside an edge-triggered always block

features.name: input_change_coincident_with_clock_edge
features.description: Code should include an input signal that changes value at the same time as a clock edge transition, where the input value is sampled via continuous assignment in the clocked block

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
